subject: fix(ui): move useShowMore hooks before early returns in Projects
body:
The two useShowMore calls were placed after the loadError early return,
violating React's rules of hooks (hooks must be called unconditionally
in the same order every render). Moved them above both early returns.

Tags: bugfix, hooks
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
